sentences.text: The red apple grows on a tall tree in the garden.
It looks fresh and shiny in the sunlight.
I wash the apple carefully before eating it.
It tastes sweet when I take a big bite.
The juice drips slowly down my hand.
My mother says apples keep us healthy.
I feel energetic after eating the fresh apple.
The yellow banana hangs from a large bunch.
It is soft and sweet inside.
I peel the banana before eating it.
It gives me energy during the day.
My father eats bananas after exercise.
The banana smells fresh and pleasant.
I enjoy eating bananas in the morning.
I eat a healthy breakfast before going to school.
There is milk, bread, and eggs on the table.
My mother prepares warm food every morning.
I drink milk because it makes me strong.
We sit together while eating breakfast.
Father reads the newspaper during the meal.
Breakfast helps me stay active throughout the day.
My mother packs a healthy lunch box for me.
There is rice, vegetables, and fruit inside.
I open my lunch box during the school break.
I share my food with my best friend.
We sit together under the big tree.
The food tastes delicious after playing.
I thank my mother for preparing my lunch.
The orange fruit grows on a small tree.
Its bright color looks beautiful in the basket.
I peel the orange carefully before eating.
The slices taste sweet and slightly sour.
Juice spills when I press the fruit.
Oranges are rich in vitamin C.
I feel refreshed after eating the orange.
Fresh vegetables are important for a healthy body.
Carrots, spinach, and tomatoes add bright colors.
My mother cooks vegetables for dinner.
We eat vegetables because they give us strength.
I wash the vegetables before cooking.
The food smells good after it is ready.
Eating vegetables helps me grow strong.
I drink a glass of warm milk every night.
Milk contains nutrients that strengthen our bones.
My mother reminds me to finish my milk.
It tastes better when I add some sugar.
The milk feels warm in my hands.
I drink milk before going to bed.
I feel healthy after drinking my milk.
We buy a large chocolate cake for the birthday.
The cake is decorated with colorful cream.
We light candles before cutting the cake.
Everyone sings loudly during the celebration.
The cake tastes sweet and soft.
Children smile happily while eating.
The celebration feels joyful and exciting.
Ice cream is my favorite dessert in summer.
It comes in many flavors like chocolate and vanilla.
The ice cream melts quickly under the hot sun.
I eat it slowly to enjoy the taste.
My friends buy ice cream after school.
We sit together and talk happily.
Ice cream makes me feel cheerful.
Our family eats dinner together every evening.
There are fresh dishes placed on the table.
We talk about our day while eating.
Mother serves warm rice and vegetables.
Father shares funny stories during dinner.
We clean the table after finishing.
Dinner time brings our family closer.
